rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: English interaction in a semi-formal environment
goals: Give students an opportunity to speak English
Learn useful English for daily life etc.

plan.text: WUQ, Groupwork, Select first topic for conversation.
WUQ, Pair work. Select second topic for conversation.
WUQ, Classwork. Select third topic for conversation.
WUQ, Group work. Select fourth topic for conversation.
WUQ, Pair work. Select fifth topic for conversation.
Possible mid-term test, (prep and present) OR regular lesson.
(MTT feedback). WUQ, Classwork. Select sixth topic for conversation.
WUQ, Group work. Select seventh topic for conversation.
WUQ, Pair work. Select eighth topic for conversation.
WUQ, Classwork. Select ninth topic for conversation.

textbooks: 500 Questions for English Learners 3 (order from Amazon)
prereq: Attend classes and do your best!
teachers: ◎ アンドリュー ジョン ハービー
